name: sandboxed_hello
description: Smoke scenario for the sandbox provider extension point. The sibling _config.json declares ``provider: docker`` plus a real image, hosts allow-list, and env passthrough; running this scenario unmodified executes the cursor agent inside a container with --cap-drop=ALL, --read-only rootfs, the worktree as the only writable mount, and CURSOR_API_KEY forwarded by name. Build the image first per examples/sandbox-images/README.md, or override with ``--sandbox host`` to run the same scenario without isolation when iterating without docker. The agent reply trivially contains 'Paris', so a green run proves both the scoring path and the sandbox handoff land cleanly.

turns.message: What is the capital of France? Reply with just the city name on its own line.
